subject: fix(ml,ui): address review findings across auto-tagging branch
body:
Fixes from code review of the full branch:

- Singleton worker dispose: Added ref-counting so Dashboard and
  ImportWizard don't destroy each other's shared worker during
  route transitions
- Worker loadModel race: Guard against concurrent loadModel() calls
  with an in-flight promise
- Batch timeout scaling: Scale timeout with batch size instead of
  fixed 10s that fails on larger imports
- Stale modelError: Clear modelError when model-ready arrives after
  a timeout
- Nested button a11y: Split TagSuggestions button-in-button into
  sibling accept/dismiss buttons
- Modal validation: Reject empty description and NaN amount on save
- Blur timer leak: Track and clean up autocomplete blur timeout
- Keyboard a11y: Add tabindex, role, keydown handlers to table rows
  and mobile cards
- Page clamping: Watch totalPages and clamp currentPage when data
  shrinks
- Duplicate import: Merge two imports from same module

Tags: ml, a11y, ux, bugfix, review
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: auto-tagging
Semver: patch

title: address review findings across auto-tagging branch
